'''yalara''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mbsf|mbsf]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-l-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mbsf|mbsf]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| yalara
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yælæræth|yælæræth]] || [[word:yælæræj|yælæræj]] || [[word:yælæræsh|yælæræsh]] || [[word:yælæræ|yælæræ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yalalarath|yalalarath]] || [[word:yalalaraj|yalalaraj]] || [[word:yalalarash|yalalarash]] || [[word:yalalara|yalalara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yalarath|yalarath]] || [[word:yalaraj|yalaraj]] || [[word:yalarash|yalarash]] || [[word:yalara|yalara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yalafrath|yalafrath]] || [[word:yalafraj|yalafraj]] || [[word:yalafrash|yalafrash]] || [[word:yalafraf|yalafraf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yalaratha|yalaratha]] || [[word:yalaraja|yalaraja]] || [[word:yalarasha|yalarasha]] || [[word:yalaraka|yalaraka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yalarath|yalarath]] || [[word:yalaraj|yalaraj]] || [[word:yalarash|yalarash]] || [[word:yalara|yalara]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yalarathal|yalarathal]] || [[word:yalarajal|yalarajal]] || [[word:yalarashal|yalarashal]] || [[word:yalarakal|yalarakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yalarathatha|yalarathatha]] || [[word:yalarajaja|yalarajaja]] || [[word:yalarashasha|yalarashasha]] || [[word:yalaraka|yalaraka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yalarathan|yalarathan]] || [[word:yalarajan|yalarajan]] || [[word:yalarashan|yalarashan]] || [[word:yalarakan|yalarakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yalarathaoro|yalarathaoro]] || [[word:yalarajaoro|yalarajaoro]] || [[word:yalarashaoro|yalarashaoro]] || [[word:yalarakaoro|yalarakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
